features.name: cf_atr_regime
features.description: ATR regime detector: short/long ATR ratio to identify expanding vs contracting volatility regimes

features.name: cf_flow_body_wick_anomaly_5m
features.description: Body-to-wick ratio anomaly on 5m: ratio of body length to full range, smoothed over 12 bars, flagging unusually dominant directional candles

features.name: cf_flow_cumulative_delta_1h
features.description: Running signed volume imbalance: cumulative delta over 6 bars on 1h, proxying buy vs sell pressure accumulation

features.name: cf_fund_diverge
features.description: Funding settlement proximity signal: contrarian momentum signal around funding settlement events using bars_until/bars_since funding settlement

features.name: cf_funding_extreme
features.description: Contrarian signal around funding settlement events: uses bars_until/bars_since funding settlement to identify pre/post settlement zones, combines with 8-bar return momentum for directional contrarian signals.

features.name: cf_funding_momentum_drift
features.description: Funding regime momentum overlay: combines existing funding proximity regime (cf_funding_regime) with 4/8-bar price momentum to create directional signals. Approaching funding with positive momentum → mean reversion short; negative → long bounce. Post-settlement follows momentum continuation.

features.name: cf_funding_regime
features.description: Funding settlement proximity regime: classifies bars into approaching_funding(1), neutral(2), post_settlement(3), at_settlement(4) based on bars_until/bars_since funding settlement.

features.name: cf_funding_settlement_gate
features.description: Funding settlement proximity gate: fires on settlement bars and the immediately following bar

features.name: cf_fwd_vol_regime
features.description: Forward 5-bar volatility regime classifier: 0=low, 1=medium, 2=high. Uses rolling quantile-based thresholds on forward return volatility.

features.name: cf_mean_rev_pressure
features.description: Mean-reversion pressure: z-score of close vs 24h rolling VWAP, amplified by RSI divergence filter. Continuous value: positive=overbought pressure, negative=oversold. Divergence between price and RSI momentum amplifies the signal 1.5x.

features.name: cf_momentum_divergence_6_24
features.description: Cross-lookback momentum divergence: 6-bar ROC minus 24-bar ROC. Positive = short-term momentum accelerating relative to longer-term (trend strengthening). Negative = short-term momentum weakening relative to longer-term (trend exhaustion / transition signal). Captures regime transitions that single-timeframe anchors cannot detect.

features.name: cf_range_compression_1h
features.description: Ratio of 12-bar ATR to 48-bar ATR on 1h, detecting contraction before expansion moves. Values < 1 = compression, > 1 = expansion.

features.name: cf_range_compression_5m
features.description: Ratio of 12-bar ATR to 48-bar ATR on 5m, detecting contraction before expansion moves. Values < 1 = compression, > 1 = expansion.

features.name: cf_rv_percentile_48
features.description: Rolling 48-bar percentile rank of realized variance — identifies regime extremes

features.name: cf_rv_ratio_6_24
features.description: Ratio of 6-bar realized variance to 24-bar realized variance on 1h — spikes above 1.5 signal volatility expansion

features.name: cf_vol_absorption_score
features.description: Volume absorption: volume z-score times (1 - body/range), smoothed over 6 bars. High values = large volume with small body = institutional absorption.

features.name: cf_vol_asymmetry_1h
features.description: Ratio of upside candle body range to total body range over rolling 6 bars on 1h, capturing directional vol skew from OHLCV alone. Values > 0 = upside dominance, < 0 = downside dominance.

features.name: cf_vol_expansion_flag
features.description: Vol expansion flag: binary 1 when 5-bar realized vol exceeds 20-bar vol by 1.5x, else 0. Captures sudden vol breakouts.

features.name: cf_vol_imbalance_12
features.description: Rolling 12-bar volume imbalance: (sum_up_vol - sum_down_vol) / total_vol on 5m bars

features.name: cf_vol_price_div
features.description: Volume-price divergence: signed rolling price-volume correlation, negative means price trends without volume confirmation

features.name: cf_vol_regime_compression
features.description: 20-bar realized vol percentile rank vs 100-bar window; -1=compression (bottom decile), 1=expansion (top decile), 0=neutral

features.name: cf_vol_regime_switch
features.description: Volatility regime switch detector: binary flag (0/1) based on ATR ratio of 6h vs 48h rolling windows. Value=1 when short-term vol deviates significantly from long-term (ratio >1.2 or <0.8), indicating regime transition.

features.name: cf_vol_regime_transition
features.description: Vol regime transition: 20-bar realized vol percentile minus 5-bar realized vol percentile over 100-bar window. Positive = vol expanding, negative = vol contracting.

features.name: cf_vol_regime_vov
features.description: Vol-of-vol ratio: 5-bar ATR std / 20-bar ATR std. Values > 1 indicate short-term vol accelerating relative to longer-term.

features.name: cf_vol_squeeze_breakout
features.description: Detects volatility squeeze release: ratio of 6-bar to 24-bar realized vol crosses above 0.65 after being below 0.55 for 3+ consecutive bars. Binary 1/0 signal.

features.name: cf_vol_term_spread
features.description: Volatility term-structure regime signal. Ratio of 12-period (1h) to 96-period (8h) rolling return std, minus 1. Values >0 = vol expansion (trending regime), <0 = vol contraction (mean-reverting regime). Captures regime TRANSITIONS, not levels — orthogonal to ATR and single-window vol features.

features.name: cf_vwap_dev
features.description: Percentage distance of close from 24-period rolling VWAP. Positive = price above VWAP, negative = price below VWAP. Captures mean-reversion regimes.

features.name: cf_zscore_reversion
features.description: Z-score mean-reversion: 24-bar rolling z-score of close price. Positive values = oversold (buy signal for mean-reversion), negative = overbought.

next_recommended_actions: Use features_custom(action='inspect', view='detail') for one definition or features_custom(action='publish') to update one.
data.next_action: Use features_custom(action='inspect', view='detail') for one definition or features_custom(action='publish') to update one.
